product_results.title: IGOLUMON Dog Travel Bag Large Pet Travel Bags Set for Supplies Weekend Travel Kit Tote Organizer Multi-Pockets Food Travel Bag with 2 Extra Large Food Containers, 2 Dog Bowls, 1 Feeding Mat

details.heading: Ships in product packaging
details.content: This item has been tested to certify it can ship safely in its original box or bag to avoid unnecessary packaging. Since 2015, we have reduced the weight of outbound packaging per shipment by 41% on average, that’s over 2 million tons of packaging material.If you still require Amazon packaging for this item, choose "Ship in Amazon packaging" at checkout. Learn more

about_item: 【Large Capacity Dog Travel Bag】The dog travel bag is spacious and well-organized, with a 25L capacity to store all your dog's gear while traveling. It comes with 2 extra large food storage containers (5L capacity x 2), which can feed dogs for 1 week. It also includes two silicone collapsible dog bowls with carabiners and 1 pet placemat. This pet travel bag is perfect for dogs of all sizes and is easy to feed while out. It is suitable for weekend outings, travel, temporary boarding, etc.

【Multiple Pockets & well-organized】Our dog bags for traveling has ample compartments for storing all your pet's needs in one place. With large compartments for dog toys, treats, diapers, and more, as well as side pockets for storing poop bags, it offers convenient storage solutions for all dog sizes. The bag features multi-function pockets and an adjustable divider for flexible storage and organization.

【Reliable & Durable Quality】We always put the health of our pets first. This large dog travel food bag is made of waterproof Oxford fabric and features durable, high-quality zippers for a long-lasting user experience. The food container features a waterproof lining to keep dog food dry and fresh. These dog travel accessories are made with durable and safe materials, environmentally friendly and non-toxic materials, and safe for pets. This makes it a great gift for dog owners.

【Airline Approved & Easy to Carry】This dog travel kit is airline approved and fits under most seats, allowing you and your pet to travel with full comfort and style. It comes with a handle, padded shoulder strap, and luggage belt, so it can be used as a handbag, shoulder bag, or slid over luggage handles. The thoughtful and convenient design makes transporting your pet effortless, making it a must-have for dog travel.

【Convenient Design】The pet travel bag features a top drawstring and front adjustable straps for storing extra dog blankets or a feeding mat. Ideal for car trips, beach vacations, camping excursions, air travel, and all outdoor adventures with your pet, this dog overnight bag is a must-have for any pet owner. It's also a perfect gift for dog lovers and new pet parents on holidays and special occasions.

summary.text: Customers find the pet travel bag spacious, with one mentioning it holds 12 cups of dry kibble, and appreciate its organization with lots of pockets. The bag is well-built and easy to carry, making it perfect for traveling with pets. They like its functionality, with one customer noting the plastic bag inside the pouch works great for storing kibble, and consider it good value for money.

authors_reviews.title: The Ultimate Travel Companion for My Dog's Meal Comfort
authors_reviews.text: Traveling with my dog has never been easier thanks to this amazing travel bag set It's incredibly well-organized with so many pockets for everything my pup needs. The two extra-large food containers are perfect for storing enough kibble for a weekend getaway, and the included bowls and feeding mat are super convenient. The tote itself is sturdy and well-made. This set has taken the stress out of packing for my dog – I highly recommend it to any pet parent who loves to travel with their four-legged companion.
authors_reviews.author: Shamanjc

authors_reviews.title: Internal pouches and lots of space
authors_reviews.text: This is a good little bag that is a decent size. My favorite thing about it is that the inside is lined with a slick kind of material so it's super cleanable. I'm pretty confident it would even hold water for a time. It actually has two separate pouches inside of it for the food but to fit more for our big dog, we just took those out and dumped the food directly into the bag and it works great both ways. Dog food leaves a gross residue but this is highly cleanable. It also has several pockets I didn't take much consideration to when I was purchasing but really liked those in use. It allowed me to store collapsible bowls and long lead. The bowls and a scoop come with it so that's a plus. I would buy this again if needed. It is worth the money
authors_reviews.author: Amber

authors_reviews.title: THE BEST DOG TRAVEL BAG YOU WILL EVER OWN!!
authors_reviews.text: THE ONLY WAY THIS BAG COULD BE IMPROVED IS IF IT WAS OFFERED IN ADDITIONAL COLORS SUCH AS BLUE & BLACK and PINK & BLACK (but, even then it might get dirty looking so I’m personally fine with the black and grey). This bag IS 100% QUALITY ALL THE WAY. It looks and feels like a QUALITY item and NOT CHEAP LIKE MANY OTHER PET ITEMS. 100% worth every penny!!! This bag is so good I just bought a second bag for my toy breed. There is an abundance of storage pockets, clips, and even a front buckle. Interior is nylon (wipes clean with damp cloth). Exterior is heavy duty nylon, heavy duty zippers, heavy duty rings for carabiner clips, bungee cord on top, heavy duty carry handles and strap (with shoulder pad). 7 pockets, and exterior buckle straps in for a rolled up blanket or food bowl mat. The interior held 1week plus 1 day worth of food. Plus a dog food bag with about 8 cups of emergency large breed dog kibble. It held 6 large “no hide” and “healthy edible bones”, two leashes (freedom walker leash & 10 ft potty leash), 20 grocery Poop bags , pill box, squeeze cheese, spoons, a food, water bowl, and mat are included but I used my ultra GIANT Breed slopper stoppers bowls because my dog free feeds and the. Included food and water bowls were too small for him (for reference we have a 55lb dog) which fit in this bag no problem. Also, a package of baby wipes, 1 ball, and 3 large “tough” chewer toys. Seller offered me a 20% off coupon on my second bag (BONUS)! Now , each of my dogs has one packed and ready to go for the next time they need to go to the pet sitter. I hope to edit this review with pictures soon.
authors_reviews.author: D

authors_reviews.title: erfect Travel Companion for Pet Parents
authors_reviews.text: This dog travel bag has been a lifesaver! It fits everything I need for my pup—leash, bowls, treats, toys, grooming supplies—so I can keep it packed and ready to go without worrying about forgetting anything.The food container looks small at first, but don’t be fooled—it holds a surprising amount and keeps everything sealed and fresh. I did have a minor issue with the elastic strap for the blanket (it snapped), but customer service was excellent. They sent me a brand new bag within days, no questions asked.If you travel with pets, this bag is a must-have. Functional, organized, and backed by great support. I absolutely love it!
authors_reviews.author: Celia

authors_reviews.title: Perfect Pet Luggage
authors_reviews.text: Taking my pet baby to the sitter's, I needed something that would hold everything; two of his favorite toys, food, eating bowls, treats, and his favorite blanket. This case held everything and had room for more. It seems well built and sturdy, it's definitely pretty, and has a carrying strap if ever I needed to place it on my shoulder. My baby is a 60-lb lab so the feeding bowls that came with the bag were too small for him but an inexpensive purchase remedied that issue quick enough and the pockets in the case were large enough to hold the larger collapsible bowls. The feeding mat was a bonus so there's no mess on the floor from him slurping up his water. I would definitely recommend this to anyone and when needed, will buy another one just like this.
authors_reviews.author: Purty_Tex

authors_reviews.title: Great bag!
authors_reviews.text: Just as advertised. Loved the product. Made it easy to carry my dogs food.
authors_reviews.author: Janet C.

authors_reviews.title: Dog organizer bag
authors_reviews.text: The size of the bag is great but the water bowls are too small. Love that everything fits into one convenient bag. Dog food containers are big enough for a weekend trip. Color was perfect. Have only used it a few times but the zippers seem pretty sturdy.
authors_reviews.author: Betty

authors_reviews.title: Perfect for travel
authors_reviews.text: Love being able to keep all of my dogs travel stuff in one place! Two pouches for food which I used for each dog-kibble in plastic bag inside pouch works great. Treats, toys and bowls on the other half, plus pocket on inside of lid. Medications and extras go in outside front pocket. Wish I’d ordered this years ago!!
authors_reviews.author: Tracy Myers
